description: Card combining a White House photograph with a media citation headline. The photograph (top portion, about two thirds) shows a woman with dark hair and black glasses in a white blazer speaking at a presidential lectern with a gooseneck microphone, identified contextually as Secretary of Labor Lori Chavez-DeRemer; President Trump stands behind her at right in a dark suit, white shirt, and red tie, with the Seal of the President of the United States on the lectern and an ornate Oval Office or White House interior (gold urn, bookshelves, decorative wall reliefs) in the background. The bottom third is a torn paper white strip carrying a bold navy serif all caps headline: 'TRUMP'S NEW UNION TRANSPARENCY TOOL IS A GAME CHANGER FOR WORKERS', with the 'Washington Examiner' masthead and logo beneath it.
notable_text: TRUMP'S NEW UNION TRANSPARENCY TOOL IS A GAME CHANGER FOR WORKERS; Washington Examiner
